highlights.headline: Milwaukee Bucks vs. Toronto Raptors: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Milwaukee Bucks vs. Toronto Raptors: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Milwaukee Bucks vs. Toronto Raptors: Game Highlights) 2025/11/05 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Scottie Barnes and RJ Barrett each scored 23 points, Immanuel Quickley and Sandro Mamukelashvili both had 15 and the Toronto Raptors won their third straight game by thumping the Milwaukee Bucks 128-100 on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barnes and Barrett each score 23 points as Raptors win third straight, rout Bucks 128-100

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Orlando Magic vs. Atlanta Hawks: Game Highlights) 2025/11/05 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Zaccharie Risacher scored 21 points, Nickeil Alexander-Walker had 20 and the Atlanta Hawks beat the Orlando Magic 127-112 on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Hawks roll to 127-112 victory over the Magic

highlights.headline: Philadelphia 76ers vs. Chicago Bulls: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Philadelphia 76ers vs. Chicago Bulls: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Philadelphia 76ers vs. Chicago Bulls: Game Highlights) 2025/11/05 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Josh Giddey had a triple-double with 29 points, 15 rebounds and 12 assists, Nikola Vucevic made a 3-pointer with 3.2 seconds remaining and the Chicago Bulls came back from a 24-point deficit to beat the Philadelphia 76ers 113-111 on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Giddey has triple-double, Vucevic hits late 3 as Bulls rally from 24 down to beat Sixers 113-111

events.name: Charlotte Hornets at New Orleans Pelicans

highlights.description: Charlotte Hornets vs. New Orleans Pelicans: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Charlotte Hornets vs. New Orleans Pelicans: Game Highlights) 2025/11/05 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Jose Alvarado made a go-ahead 3-pointer with 16 seconds left and the New Orleans Pelicans won for the first time this season by beating the Charlotte Hornets 116-112 on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Alvarado's 3-pointer sends Pelicans past Hornets for their first win of the season

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Phoenix Suns vs. Golden State Warriors: Game Highlights) 2025/11/05 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Stephen Curry scored 28 points with five 3-pointers, Moses Moody came off the bench to score 24 and also hit five 3s, and the Golden State Warriors jumped to a big early lead before holding on for a 118-107 victory over the short-handed Phoenix Suns...
headlines.shortLinkText: Stephen Curry scores 28 points, Moses Moody adds 24 as Warriors beat Suns 118-107

events.name: Oklahoma City Thunder at LA Clippers

highlights.headline: SGA reaches 30 with another triple
highlights.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander stays red-hot from deep as the Thunder extend their lead.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (SGA reaches 30 with another triple) 2025/11/5 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander had 30 points and 12 assists and the defending champion Oklahoma City Thunder extended their season-opening winning streak to eight games with a 126-107 victory over the Los Angeles Clippers on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Thunder surge past Clippers 126-107 to extend season-opening winning streak to 8

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (SGA reaches 30 with another triple) 2025/11/5 ESHEET
